name: ROT47
author: EncoderStudio
description: Rotates ASCII printable characters (33-126) by 47 positions. Self-inverse.

name: NATO Phonetic Alphabet
author: EncoderStudio
description: Converts letters to NATO phonetic alphabet words (Alpha, Bravo, Charlie...).

name: Braille Unicode
author: EncoderStudio
description: Converts ASCII letters and digits to Unicode Braille patterns.
